imageBase64.description:
ImageBase64 is the raw base64 payload, *without* the "data:image/..." prefix.
Frontends that have a data: URL should strip the prefix before sending.

rows.description: empty if caller may not see others

repeat.description: null = single event; only honoured on create

sectionId.description: SectionID nil/empty removes the member from any section.

noteInConcerts.description:
NoteInConcerts is only populated on single-concert responses; the list
endpoint stays lean and omits it.

noteIds.description: NoteIds is the complete ordered program of the concert (replace semantics).

imageBase64.description: ImageBase64 (optional, no data: prefix) enables the AI vision fallback.

ocrText.description: OcrText is the client-side tesseract output for the photographed page.
